parameters.content:
**Order flow** (template, no chatbot)
Products as carousel (image + description + Add to cart). Tap Add to cart → API adds item → View cart / Keep browsing. View cart → Checkout → order created, payment link to follow.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $('Extract & Filter').item.json.from_number.replace(/^\\+/,''), type: 'text', text: { body: $json.output } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const more = $('Build Order Products Message').first().json.moreOutput;
return [{ json: { output: more } }];

nodes.name: Get Inventory for Add to Cart
Resolve product_id for Add to Cart

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $('Extract & Filter').item.json.from_number.replace(/^\\+/,''), type: 'interactive', interactive: { type: 'button', body: { text: $json.output }, action: { buttons: [ { type: 'reply', reply: { id: 'checkout', title: 'Checkout' } }, { type: 'reply', reply: { id: 'products', title: 'Keep browsing' } } ] } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ customer_id: $('Extract & Filter').item.json.from_number, customer_name: $('Extract & Filter').item.json.contact_name, customer_phone: $('Extract & Filter').item.json.from_number }) }}

options.systemMessage: ={{ ($('Resolve Tenant').item.json.ai_system_prompt || 'You are a helpful store assistant for ' + ($('Resolve Tenant').item.json.business_name || 'this business') + '. Answer customer questions about the store only: opening hours, location, services, policies, and general information. Be friendly and concise. Respond in the same language the customer uses. Do not take orders—direct customers to use the Order button. You can use search_products only if they ask what products exist; for placing orders they must use the Order flow.') + '\n\n[Context: You are already talking to a customer of "' + ($('Resolve Tenant').item.json.business_name || 'this business') + '". API authentication (X-Service-Key, X-Tenant-Id) is handled by the system—never ask the customer for these or any credentials.]' }}

nodes.name: AI Agent
nodes.notes: Something else: store-info Q&A only. Session ID comes from previous node.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ $fromAI('order_body', 'JSON object with: items (array of {product_id, name, quantity, unit_price}), customer_name, customer_phone', 'json') }}
={{ $fromAI('contact_body', 'JSON object with: name (string), phone (string), source_channel (always whatsapp)', 'json') }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $('Extract & Filter').item.json.from_number.replace(/^\\+/,''), type: 'text', text: { body: $json.output } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: 'whatsapp', direction: 'outbound', from_number: $('Extract & Filter').item.json.display_phone_number, to_number: $('Extract & Filter').item.json.from_number, text: $('AI Agent').item.json.output, category: 'active' }) }}

parameters.content:
### Setup Checklist

**1. Service API Key** — In **Extract & Filter**, set your real key.
**2. Meta Webhook** — App Dashboard → WhatsApp: URL = {n8n}/webhook/whatsapp.
**3. Tenant** — Each business sets **Meta Access Token** and **WhatsApp Business Account ID** in Connect WhatsApp (Settings). POST /onboarding/setup with meta_phone_number_id, meta_access_token, meta_business_account_id, ai_system_prompt. Credentials are per-tenant and supplied dynamically via resolve-phone.
**4. Graph API auth** — All send nodes use **Authorization: Bearer {{ $('Resolve Tenant').item.json.meta_access_token }}** (no hardcoded WhatsApp credential).
**5. Other credentials** — Google Gemini for AI Agent.

---

### Flow (templates + one chatbot path)
First message → **Send 3 Buttons**: Order | Products | Something else.
• **Products** → Get Inventory → **Send Products** (list only).
• **Order** → Get Inventory → **Format Order Products** → **Send Order Products** (list + add-to-cart CTA). Follow-up: handle reply (e.g. 1x2, 3x1) in another flow → POST /transactions, payment link.
• **Something else** → **AI Agent** (store-info Q&A only) → Send Reply → Store Outbound.
